title: neocupressus macrocarpa
intro: Neocupressus macrocarpa, also known as Monterey cypress, is a coniferous evergreen tree native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Neocupressus macrocarpa include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Neocupressus macrocarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Neocupressus macrocarpa is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including coughs, colds, and skin irritations.
